Description: Verify POST creates a new pet
Steps: 1. Set method to POST. 2. Set URL to /pet. 3. Add JSON body with ID 77665544. 4. Send request.
Expected Result: Status code 200 and body contains ID 77665544

Steps: 1. Set method to GET. 2. Set URL to /pet/77665544. 3. Send request.
Expected Result: Status code 200 and body contains name RestAssured_Dog

Steps: 1. Set method to PUT. 2. Set URL to /pet. 3. Add JSON body with status 'sold'. 4. Send request.
Expected Result: Status code 200 and body contains status sold

Steps: 1. Set method to DELETE. 2. Set URL to /pet/77665544. 3. Send request.
Expected Result: Status code 200 and body message equals 77665544

Description: Verify deleted pet is not found
Steps: 1. Set method to GET. 2. Set URL to /pet/77665544. 3. Send request.
Expected Result: Status code 404 and message 'Pet not found'
